meta.title: Ulta AI CLI — Cruft Removal Review
meta.description: Skill lifecycle audit: items pending approval before deletion

props.title: Cruft Removal Review
props.subtitle: ulta-ai-cli skill lifecycle audit — nothing is deleted until you approve it

props.content: The audit found zero skills worth deleting — all 5 suspects survived adversarial verification. What remains is file-level cruft and stale docs. Each item below carries its evidence and a confidence level. Approve, defer, or veto per row.

props.label: BLOCKER
props.title: One decision only you can make
.agents/skills/ mirror is staged for deletion
props.content: The entire committed dogfood mirror (.agents/skills/**) sits as staged deletions in the working tree. The CI parity guard (src/lib/__tests__/dogfood-skills-guard.test.js) requires this mirror to match src/skills/ — committing the deletion breaks the guard; restoring it re-syncs ~35 files. Was this deletion deliberate (dropping committed dogfood copies) or accidental? Team agents were instructed not to touch it.

props.label: PENDING APPROVAL
props.title: File-level cruft — skill directories
props.subtitle: Author-time artifacts and orphans shipping inside the distributed skill bundle

rows.evidence: Author-time validation artifacts bundled into every install; inflate the synced skill payload
Authoring provenance log, not agent instruction; also leaks /Users/jesse paths
1,150-line raw Mintlify scrape with broken img/CardGroup markup and CDN URLs that render as noise
Orphan placeholder template; not under src/templates/agents/; referenced by nothing in the build
Duplicates the dedicated review-checklist skill; two sources of truth for the same checklist

props.label: VERIFIED — NO DELETION
props.title: All five cruft suspects survived adversarial review
props.subtitle: Each verdict is backed by git history, loader-code wiring, and doc citations

rows.why: Core planning node; 5 skills + init.js route to it. Body was accidentally wiped to 0 bytes in WIP commit 32e389c
Documented cap of the sprint flow (dx-flows UC8) but no runtime invoker exists
rows.followup: Wire into --epic completion or a schedule; fix GNU-only date -d and .beads/ hard deps

rows.why: Shipped in v1.2.0; survived a deliberate keep/cut in commit bd26719. Docs still use pre-rename alias agentic-cli
rows.followup: Reconcile naming in dx-flows.md and skill-testing-matrix.md

rows.why: Jira-ticketed feature (CFBOLT-1952); on-demand trigger is its wiring by design
Agent-facing playbook for shipped ulta skill promote; error table mirrors real ULTA_PROMOTE_* codes

props.label: PENDING APPROVAL
props.title: Stale documentation
props.subtitle: Doc-vs-reality drift was the audit's dominant enterprise risk

rows.evidence: Describes the retired Gemini-extension era (build.js, gemini-cli-context/, load-context.py, .ulta/.system/) — contradicts README.md and docs/guides/cli-architecture.md
Raw v2.0 session-handoff artifact; references plans moved to docs/_archive and unshipped features (beads first-class, MCP server, LLM-TLDR)
Extension-era machinery; cli-architecture.md confirms no such runtime surface exists

rows.doc: Context naming split across 4 governance docs
rows.evidence: skills.md / skill-governance.md / dx-flows.md / skill-testing-matrix.md still say 00-overview.md + 01-code-style.md; repo-context skill mandates business/architecture/delivery + .ulta/rules/ — actively breaks standards-code

props.label: IN FLIGHT
props.title: Tier 0 fixes — team status
props.subtitle: Release-blocking repairs running now; none touch the items awaiting your approval

items.title: Restore writing-plans SKILL.md
items.description: 209 lines recovered verbatim from commit 50ec245; frontmatter verified; all four cross-skill references valid.

items.title: Create 3 missing SDD dispatch templates
items.description: implementer / spec-reviewer / code-quality-reviewer prompts copied from the canonical superpowers pack; already agent-neutral.

items.title: Fix malformed frontmatter in 5 skills
items.description: research-conductor, executing-plans, defense-in-depth, repo-automation, standards-testing — plus de-referencing 6 phantom skills.

items.title: Repair finishing-a-development-branch
items.description: Resolving 3 contradictory worktree-cleanup statements, the L111 placeholder bug, and branch-detection logic.

items.title: Wire skill validation into CI
items.description: Gate against 0-byte SKILL.md and malformed frontmatter so this class of rot cannot ship again.
